name: Ludo King
author: Poki
description: Ludo King is the official, smash-hit Ludo game loved by players all over the world! The game brings the classic board game online which is known in many places as Pachisi or Parcheesi. Play online with friends and players across the globe or pratice your skill by yourself. Roll the dice, relive your childhood memories, and enjoy beautifully designed boards in Online or Computer Mode. Ready to join the world’s favorite Ludo game? How to play Ludo King? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Ludo King? Ludo King is created by Gametion Global. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Ludo King for free? You can play Ludo King for free on Poki. Can I play Ludo King on mobile devices and desktop? Ludo King can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Ludo King with my friend? Yes! Ludo King is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
